sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44041" key="eu)queph/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐθῠ-επής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἔπος</etym>) <sense id="n44041.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">plain-spoken</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Adam.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.16</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
